text:
INSULIN_OONP_COPAY_1M, INSULIN_OONP_COPAY_OS, 
and INSULIN_LTCP_COPAY_1M

variables to the Plan Crosswalk file for the 2024 reference

• Adjusted list of valid values for DED_APPLY_ALL

October 2024 K. Schneider • Updated plan base file to indicate the FIDE_SNP field is 
retired and the DSNP_ZERODOLLAR field is moved to the SNP 
contract file in the 2023 file

AIP_INDICATOR,
